title: KULR Technology receives follow-on PCM heat sink tech order from Lockheed Martin
text: KULR Technology Group Inc (NYSE:KULR) announced that it has received a follow-on order for its space-developed phase change material (PCM) heat sink technology from aerospace and defense giant Lockheed Martin Corporation. The manufacturer of carbon fiber thermal management technologies for batteries and electronic systems said its PCM heat sink technology is compact, reliable, and lightweight and has been utilized by leaders in the US aerospace and defense industries.

title: United States Army and Sikorsky Strengthen Army Aviation Fleet with 10th H-60 Black Hawk Helicopter Contract
text: STRATFORD, Conn. , June 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The United States government and Sikorsky, a Lockheed Martin company (NYSE: LMT), signed a five-year contract for a baseline of 120 H-60M Black Hawk helicopters, with options to reach a total of 255 aircraft to be delivered to the U.S. Army and Foreign Military Sales (FMS) customers.
